declarations.name: resolve_fsl_source

parameters.name: fsl_attr
parameters.description: The current value of the host's `fsl` attribute (or property), or empty string.

declarations.description:
Web component that owns a single `Machine<unknown>` constructed from an
FSL source supplied via one of three mutually exclusive channels:

  1. The `fsl=""` attribute,
  2. A child `<script type="text/fsl">`,
  3. The element's own text content (companion `<jssm-*>` children and
     any `<script type="text/fsl">` are excluded from this channel).

Supplying zero or more than one channel is a thrown error.

On every transition the component reflects machine state to its own
attributes (`current-state`, `legal-actions`, `terminal`, `complete`)
and sets a `--current-state` CSS custom property so consumer CSS can
style by state without subclassing.
declarations.name: JssmInstance

cssProperties.description: The machine's current state name as a CSS string token.
cssProperties.name: --current-state

slots.description: Visualization slot; fallback is a placeholder string.
slots.name: viz

slots.description: Slot for an info / status panel.
slots.name: info-panel

members.name: fsl
members.description:
FSL source attribute.  When non-empty, this is the sole channel
supplying the machine's source.  Setting both this and a child
`<script type="text/fsl">` (or non-empty text content) is an error.

members.name: _machine
members.description:
The underlying machine instance, constructed at `connectedCallback`.
Exposed raw (not proxied) per the #639/#648 design decision so that
consumers can use the full Machine API directly.

Marked optional because Lit will instantiate the element before
`connectedCallback` runs; the instance is guaranteed present after
connection.

members.name: machine
members.description: Raw machine accessor.  Returns the owned Machine instance.

members.name: do

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Optional data payload to pass to the action.

members.description:
Convenience wrapper for `machine.action(action, data)`.
After the action, reflects updated state to host attributes and the
`--current-state` CSS custom property, and requests a Lit update so
the state-specific `<slot name="state-...">` can re-pick.

members.name: state
members.description:
Convenience wrapper for `machine.state()`.  Returns the current
state's name.

members.name: _paint_state_reflection
members.description:
Reflect machine state onto host attributes and CSS custom properties.
Called after every transition and once during `connectedCallback`.

Mechanism 1 (#639): writes to host attributes.
Mechanism 3 (#639): writes to host inline-style custom properties.

attributes.name: fsl
attributes.description:
FSL source attribute.  When non-empty, this is the sole channel
supplying the machine's source.  Setting both this and a child
`<script type="text/fsl">` (or non-empty text content) is an error.

declarations.name: normalize_viz_error

declarations.description:
Web component that renders a jssm machine as inline SVG.

Two operating modes:

  1. **Standalone** (no parent `<jssm-instance>` ancestor): render from
     the element's own `fsl=""` attribute / property.  Re-renders on
     attribute change.
  2. **Nested** (inside a `<jssm-instance>` ancestor, found via
     `closest('jssm-instance')` at `connectedCallback`): bind to the
     parent's machine and re-render on every `transition` event.  The
     element's own `fsl` attribute is ignored in this mode; supplying it
     emits a `console.warn` for developer feedback.
declarations.name: JssmViz

cssProperties.description: Minimum height of the rendered SVG container.
cssProperties.name: --jssm-viz-min-height

members.name: _parent_host
members.description:
Parent `<jssm-instance>` host reference, set in `connectedCallback`
when a parent is found.  When non-null the viz is in nested mode and
renders the parent's machine instead of its own `fsl` attribute.

members.name: _parent_sub
members.description:
Unsubscribe callback returned from `host.machine.on('transition', ...)`.
Held so `disconnectedCallback` can release the subscription.

members.name: _rerenderFromHostMachine
members.description:
Nested-mode render path.  Renders the bound parent's machine via the
machine_to_svg_string pipeline and commits the result to
`_svg`.  On failure emits a `viz-error` `CustomEvent` and clears the
SVG.

members.name: _renderSvg
members.description:
Render the current `fsl` source to an SVG string via the headless
`fsl_to_svg_string` pipeline. Updates `_svg` on success; emits a
`viz-error` `CustomEvent` on failure. Guards against stale results
when `fsl` changes mid-flight.

events.name: viz-error
events.description: Fires when the FSL source fails to parse or render.
